---
title: "Data & Downloads"
subtitle: "Estimates, Shapefiles, and Replication Materials"
---

## Municipal Estimates

::: {.download-card}
::: {.dl-info}
#### Poverty Estimates (CSV)
Municipal-level poverty headcount, extreme poverty, poverty gap, and severity for 339 municipalities. Includes BYM2 credible intervals and precision classification.
:::
[Download]{.btn-download}
:::

::: {.download-card}
::: {.dl-info}
#### Nutrition Estimates (CSV)
Municipal-level stunting, wasting, and underweight prevalence for children 0-4. Includes confidence intervals and coefficient of variation.
:::
[Download]{.btn-download}
:::

::: {.download-card}
::: {.dl-info}
#### Shapefile with Estimates
GeoPackage with municipal boundaries (GADM 4.1) joined with all poverty and nutrition estimates. Ready for GIS.
:::
[Download]{.btn-download}
:::

---

## Methodology & Code

::: {.download-card}
::: {.dl-info}
#### Replication Code (R)
Full pipeline: data harmonization, DRF, BYM2, OT calibration, uncertainty quantification, maps, and validation. 11 scripts.
:::
[GitHub](https://github.com/wernerhl/poverty-map-bolivia){.btn-download}
:::

::: {.download-card}
::: {.dl-info}
#### Working Paper (PDF)
Full methodology paper with results, validation, and robustness checks.
:::
[Download]{.btn-download}
:::

---

## Variable Dictionary

### Poverty Estimates File

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `idmun` | Municipality code (5-digit: dept*10000 + prov*100 + mun) |
| `mun_name` | Municipality name |
| `dept_name` | Department name |
| `theta_drf` | DRF poverty headcount estimate |
| `theta_bym2` | BYM2-smoothed poverty headcount |
| `theta_final` | Final raked estimate |
| `theta_ext` | Extreme poverty headcount |
| `fgt1` | Poverty gap (FGT1) |
| `fgt2` | Poverty severity (FGT2) |
| `ci90_lo`, `ci90_hi` | 90% credible interval |
| `cv_theta` | Coefficient of variation |
| `precision` | Precision class: High/Medium/Moderate/Low |
| `n_hh` | Number of census households |
| `population` | Estimated population |

### Nutrition Estimates File

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `idmun` | Municipality code |
| `stunting` | Prevalence of stunting (HAZ < -2) |
| `wasting` | Prevalence of wasting (WHZ < -2) |
| `underweight` | Prevalence of underweight (WAZ < -2) |
| `stunting_ci90_lo/hi` | 90% credible interval for stunting |
| `cv_stunting` | Coefficient of variation |
| `n_children` | Number of census children 0-4 |

---

## Terms of Use

These estimates are provided for research and policy analysis purposes. When using these data, please cite:

> Hernani-Limarino, W.L. (2025). *Small Area Estimation of Poverty and Nutrition in Bolivia Using Distributional Random Forests, Bayesian Spatial Smoothing, and Optimal Transport*. Working Paper.

The underlying microdata (EH 2024, CPV 2024, ENSDA 2023) are property of the Instituto Nacional de Estad&iacute;stica (INE) of Bolivia.
